title: Modular Arithmetic Witnesses

solver_reuse.target: modular inverse and CRT QF_LIA/Diophantine regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Nonunit inverse obstruction where 2*b - 6*k = 1 and incompatible CRT obstruction where 4*a - 6*b = 1 have no integer solution because the relevant gcd does not divide the right-hand side.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional modular arithmetic rows only when they add distinct divisibility, CRT, or finite-field solver pressure; keep deeper number-theory theorems in Lean-horizon resources.

graduation_criteria: Encode each check as deterministic Bool/BV or LIA formulas.
Replay all SAT witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Keep the promoted Diophantine obstructions tied to source artifacts, checked certificate regressions, and tamper-rejection learner coverage before claiming proof-object coverage.
Keep adding checked proof evidence for UNSAT finite-search claims beyond the promoted nonunit Diophantine obstruction.
Promote related finite-field examples into finite-fields-v0.
